description: A vertical graphic on a dark textured background. Large red text at the top reads ARRESTED, with smaller text below reading WITH THE HELP OF USCIS. The center holds a booking-style photograph of a man with short dark hair and stubble. Large light text below gives a name, Dawood Hussain, with smaller text describing him as an illegal Pakistani alien charged with felony vehicular homicide after driving a commercial truck the wrong way on a Pennsylvania highway in October 2023.
notable_text: ARRESTED; WITH THE HELP OF USCIS; DAWOOD HUSSAIN; ILLEGAL PAKISTANI ALIEN CHARGED WITH FELONY VEHICULAR HOMICIDE
